name: str-bytes
description: String to binary conversion, uint LE encoding, array concatenation
author: system

hints.overview: Latin-1 byte-per-char encoding and binary helpers for file format construction.
criticalRules: strToBytes/bytesToStr are Latin-1 (single byte per char) — NOT UTF-8
For UTF-8 encoding, use strToUtf8Bytes or TextEncoder (globally available)
uint16LE/uint32LE are for binary format headers (ZIP, PPTX internal structures)
